title: Outlined Items
description: This pack adds clean white outlines to all Minecraft items, giving tools and objects a sharper and more defined appearance. The subtle outlining makes items stand out visually and adds a cleaner, more polished look to your overall gameplay.
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ed063dd291f80f61930d13de88757412e0a2ac2_0.webp)

Outlined Items

This pack adds clean white outlines to all items, giving tools and objects a sharper and more defined look. The outlining makes items stand out on-screen and gives them a cleaner, more polished appearance overall.

 

Suggestion:

Use this pack with a shader to make the outline effect look even better — shaders enhance the overall appearance and make the outlined items look more appealing in-game.
